seoTitle: How to Integrate Brevo With WordPress Easily (2026)
metaDescription: Learn how to install the Brevo plugin on WordPress, generate an API key, and connect subscriber forms and transactional emails to your site.
intro: Connecting your WordPress site to Brevo lets you capture leads, sync user data, and route transactional emails without writing custom code. This guide covers installing the official plugin, generating a secure API key from your Brevo account, and linking the two systems through the WP-Admin dashboard. It's aimed at bloggers and site owners who want reliable email capture and delivery.

steps.heading: Install the Brevo plugin
steps.body: In WordPress, go to Plugins, Add New Plugin, search for Brevo, and click Install Now, then Activate once it finishes.

steps.heading: Generate an API key in Brevo
steps.body: In your Brevo account, click your profile name, go to SMTP & API, open API Keys, and click Generate a new API key with a clear tracking name.

steps.heading: Copy your key
steps.body: Copy the generated key immediately, since it only displays once during creation.

steps.heading: Connect WordPress to Brevo
steps.body: Back in your WordPress admin, open the Brevo tab in the sidebar, paste your API key into the v3 API Key field, and click Login.

steps.heading: Enable transactional emails
steps.body: On the setup checklist, toggle the Transactional emails option to Yes to route your site's notification emails through Brevo's delivery system.

faq.question: Where do I find my Brevo API key?
faq.answer: In your Brevo account, click your profile name, go to SMTP & API, then API Keys, and generate a new key from there.

faq.question: Why should I enable transactional emails through Brevo?
faq.answer: Routing transactional notifications through Brevo's SMTP pipeline helps avoid delivery issues common with restrictive web hosting servers.

faq.question: Can I sync existing WordPress users to Brevo?
faq.answer: Yes, the integration can align native WordPress subscriber roles and attributes into custom Brevo email lists.

faq.question: Do I need coding skills to set this up?
faq.answer: No, the plugin handles the connection through a visual setup flow, so no PHP scripting is required.
